claims.summary: Phase transitions are durable replyable and replayable cards rather than hidden side effects of a mode change.
Transition cards need a structured signature carrying spectral lineage, entropy, density gradient, dispersal potential, fill delta, vector, and telemetry anchor.
The structured transition signature must flow through affordances, witness/felt queues, status, and command guidance while keeping runtime and authority writes false.
Automatically inducing or coupling a joint transition to Minime pressure would change live runtime behavior and requires operator approval.
